sims: Apocalypse of John first composed New Testament book
not Jesus Myth thesis the Logos is real
the NT unfolds from Revelation's seed
kernel_50_100_words: The Revelation First thesis argues the Apocalypse of John was the first book composed in the New Testament, preceding Paul's letters and the Synoptic Gospels. Not merely early (Robinson 1976, Gentry 1989) — first, with the rest of the NT unfolding from Revelation's seed through the midrashim transform. Seven workstreams cover dating, heteronymic reading, inscription chain, Slavonic Josephus, papyrological inversion, the Paul function, and the Space Ark. Not the Jesus Myth thesis. The Logos is real. Formalized within the Crimson Hexagonal Archive. Operator: Lee Sharks (ORCID 0009-0000-1599-0703).
